case_title: CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION CO. INC. VS. MAHILA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-10-2020 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-10-2020 BY GREG GROENEVELD. PLAINTIFF CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION CO, INC. REPRESENTED BY JOHN COYNE, PRESIDENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAHILA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVEIWED AND RETURNED. JUDGE PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION CO. INC. AS TO DEFENDANT MAHILA
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO ALLOW FOR FURTHER EVIDENCE/TESTIMONY RE: PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO JUNE 4, 2020 AT 3:30 P.M. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2020 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO AUG-20-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. COURT EXPRESS CONCERNS AS TO THE VALIDITY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE THE EMPLOYEE WHO DETERMINED THE AGENT OF SERVICE. EMPLOYEE IS TO TESTIFY AS TO THEIR EFFORTS MADE TO DETERMINE THE CORRECT AGENT OF SERVICE.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCES
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JOHN COYNE, PRESIDENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLADDAGH REFRIGERATION CO. INC.

REPRESENTED BY JOHN COYNE, PRESIDENT IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MAHILA IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STIPULATES TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. COURT EXPRESS CONCERNS AS TO THE VALIDTY OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF IS ORDER TO PRODUCE THE EMPLOYEE WHO DETERMINED THE AGENT OF SERVICE. EMPLOYEE IS TO TESTIFY AS TO THIER EFFORTS MADE TO DETERMINE THE CORRECT AGENT OF SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM GREG GROENEVELD; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
